description_long: This object is a compact, square-shaped blue wireless earbud charging case with a hinged lid and visible wear, revealing patches of white beneath the blue paint. The case features the 'RAYCON' brand logo and name on the top, with a stylized 'R' emblem. Inside, the case houses two wireless earbuds, one of which is shown outside the case, both matching the blue and white distressed finish. The interior of the case is black, with molded recesses for the earbuds and metallic charging contacts. The earbuds themselves have silicone ear tips and a small button or touch surface on the outer face. The overall design is sleek and portable, suitable for carrying in a pocket or bag, and the case likely contains a built-in battery for charging the earbuds.
description: A blue, weathered Raycon wireless earbud charging case with matching earbuds, featuring a hinged lid and visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed blue case with the Raycon logo and a protruding earbud.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, revealing one earbud seated inside and the black interior.
description_view_2: Top-down view with the lid open, both earbud slots visible, one earbud outside the case.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with the lid open, showing the case's depth and the detached earbud.
